channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Indiana Conservatives Oust Lawmakers Over Redistricting
item.description: Grassroots conservatives in Indiana unseated several Republican state lawmakers following disagreements over redistricting efforts.

item.title: White House details systems for preserving records
item.description: The White House revealed its methods for preserving presidential records, informing a federal judge about systems in place.

item.title: Trump and Xi to Discuss Issues Beyond Taiwan
item.description: Taiwan's status is a factor, but other issues are expected to be central to discussions.

item.title: Reading 'Animal Farm' in Reverse
item.description: An examination of Orwell's allegory from a different perspective.
